story.text: The actuator model (bdo co-design): the gateway IS the actuator — pull/block/route happens because the gateway enforces an ambient threshold (a homeostatic setpoint), and it enforces BOTH ways: shed/quarantine excess, and FILL voids (a sub-setpoint absence is a fill-trigger). The patrol is a scheduled surfacer over a bounded location, composed of surfacers, that finds work near its gateway and routes it by state, reports activity, detains (reversible quarantine) bad actors, and logs threshold use — the sense/act line held: the patrol may quarantine and present, never judge. Settings derived where possible, grounded in environmental policy. Value: terminal pull gets a concrete actuator (threshold enforcement), and the loop senses-and-fills voids instead of only draining.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
